name: Agochora
overview: The series is an adaptation of Mohammad Nazim Uddin best-selling eponymous novel. The story is about a sport-shooter who is forced into a life of crime and uses his shooting skills to assassinate.

trailers.title: Agochora | A Binge Original | Official Trailer | Siddiq Ahamed | Releasing on August 10
